description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: mirror and testing. Add a GH Mirror job that runs in the mirror stage using the haffmans/git-mirror:latest Docker image and executes the command git-mirror "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" git@github.com:${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}. Add a Rust Tests job that runs in the testing stage using the rust:latest Docker image and executes rustc --version && cargo --version then cargo test --all --verbose -- --test-threads=1. No caches, artifacts, or special triggers are defined.
